exact_action: Refine the trust scan so prose mentions of secret/password do not trip the hard packetization gate.
acceptable_alternatives: Tighten the trust scan so bare prose mentions of secret words stop forcing must_not_packetize
Reduce the trust scan false positives before enabling any trust enforcement
actionability_rubric: The action must directly reduce false positives in the observe-only trust scan and keep the work inside the current tranche.
